mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement: Because why settle for anything less than the world revolving around you? Sign up today and start living like the center of the universe you truly are! 

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this-there I was, sipping my imported organic matcha latte in the most exclusive caf in town, minding my own business as usual. Suddenly, this poor unsuspecting peasant accidentally bumped into me, causing a tiny splash of latte to land on my designer suit. The audacity!I recoiled in shock, my hand flying dramatically to my chest as if I had just been dealt a fatal blow. "How dare you!" I exclaimed, my voice cutting through the ambient chatter like a knife. The caf fell silent, all eyes on us. I demanded to see the manager, of course.Upon his arrival, I launched into an impassioned tirade about the irreparable damage to my meticulously crafted image. I demanded not only a full refund for my latte but also a voucher for a year's worth of free beverages, a public apology broadcasted on their social media channels, and for the offending barista to be banished to latte-making exile.The manager, clearly shaken by my righteous indignation, complied with my every demand. As I left the caf, the other patrons bowed their heads in reverence, acknowledging my unrivaled entitlement. And just like that, my day was saved, and justice was served. Moral of the story? Never underestimate the power of a truly entitled individual, for we shall always prevail!
